proposed_relations.description: The September 19, 2012 public workshop was conducted as part of the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) conducted a Public Workshop on September 19, 2012

decisions.rationale: The workshop event observed in the source is a public workshop conducted by NYC DOT and MTA NYCT for the 125th Street Transportation Improvements Project

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) conducted a Public Workshop on September 19, 2012
Wednesday, September 19, 2012 The Alhambra Ballroom of NY 2116 Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard New York, NY 10027 6 – 8 PM

proposed_relations.description: Claim about bus bunching on 125th Street raised at the September 2012 public workshop

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus bunching is an issue. It occurs often on the M60 (during the AM peak period) and is most evident on 125th Street at Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard, Frederick Douglass Boulevard, Madison and Lexington Avenues.

decisions.rationale: Claim about bus bunching was raised as a bus operation issue at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus bunching is an issue. It occurs often on the M60 (during the AM peak period) and is most evident on 125th Street at Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard, Frederick Douglass Boulevard, Madison and Lexington Avenues.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about M60 unreliability raised at the September 2012 public workshop

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 is unreliable, service is slow and unpredictable.

decisions.rationale: Claim about M60 unreliability was raised as a bus operation issue at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 is unreliable, service is slow and unpredictable.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about buses delayed by red lights, traffic congestion and turning vehicles on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Buses are often delayed by Red lights. Traffic congestion. Rush hour traffic at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge slows the buses. Vehicles turning off of and onto 125th Street restrict traffic flow and delay buses.

decisions.rationale: Claim about bus delays was raised at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Buses are often delayed by: Red lights. Traffic congestion. Rush hour traffic at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge slows the buses. Vehicles turning off of and onto 125th Street restrict traffic flow and delay buses.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about double parking on 125th Street corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: Double parking is an issue throughout the corridor, especially at the following locations: Between St. Nicholas Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard. At the Pathmark supermarket between Lexington and Third Avenues.

decisions.rationale: Claim about double parking was raised at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Double parking is an issue throughout the corridor, especially at the following locations: Between St. Nicholas Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard. At the Pathmark supermarket between Lexington and Third Avenues.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about pedestrian safety on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian safety is of great concern. There has been an increase in pedestrian injuries and fatalities in recent years.

decisions.rationale: Claim about pedestrian safety was raised at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian safety is of great concern. There has been an increase in pedestrian injuries and fatalities in recent years.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about heavy traffic congestion between Third and Eighth Avenues on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Heavy traffic congestion occurs often between Third and Eighth Avenues. Congestion is a significant problem between Fifth and Second Avenues, traveling eastbound towards the bridge.

decisions.rationale: Claim about traffic congestion was raised at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Heavy traffic congestion occurs often between Third and Eighth Avenues. Congestion is a significant problem between Fifth and Second Avenues, traveling eastbound towards the bridge.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about tour buses causing congestion on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Tour buses and inter-city carriers cause congestion and take up curb space.

decisions.rationale: Claim about tour buses causing congestion was raised at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Tour buses and inter-city carriers cause congestion and take up curb space.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about attendees interest in Select Bus Service elements

evidence_refs.source_quote: Attendees were interested in the Select Bus Service elements, similar to M15 on First and Second Avenues that were presented

decisions.rationale: Claim about attendees interest in SBS was documented at the September 2012 public workshop on 125th Street
